title: Databricks connector in Microsoft Power Platform is in Public Preview
body:
Use Databricks data to build canvas apps in Power Apps, flows in Power Automate, and agents in Copilot Studio by creating a Databricks connection in Power Platform.

See [Databricks and Microsoft Power Platform integration](/aws/en/integrations/msft-power-platform).

ref_links.text: Databricks and Microsoft Power Platform integration
